perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman wearing headphones speaking to the camera while seated in a modern airplane cabin. (2) The scene transitions to show an Emirates Business class card, followed by a man drinking juice and a series of clips demonstrating cabin features: legroom, a lie-flat bed, seat control buttons, reading lights, and a wireless charging pad. (3) The woman unpacks an amenity kit, showing a sleep mask, headphones, and pajamas. (4) A sequence of dining shots follows, showing a salad being dressed, a soup being eaten, a steak main course, and a dessert. (5) The woman then conducts a tour of the airplane bathroom, highlighting the toilet, sink, perfume, and dental kits. (6) The video concludes with the woman brushing her teeth in the mirror.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music starts immediately along with a woman's friendly Mandarin vocal narration. (2) A man's voice is heard asking about the juice, followed by the sound of gulping and a 'ding' sound effect as features are shown. (3) Continuous low-frequency ambient engine hum is present in the background throughout the cabin scenes. (4) Occasional clinking sounds of silverware and plates are heard during the meal sequence. (5) A flight attendant's voice can be heard in the background interacting with other passengers. (6) The music remains constant until fading out into a silent 'zzz' graphic at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Mandarin subtitles provide a literal translation of the spoken dialogue. (2) Decorative Hook: '阿聯酋商務艙體驗' (Emirates Business Class Experience) appears in a variety-show style font at the beginning. (3) Informational Text: Labels like '放鞋子的地方' (Place for shoes) and '躺平真的好舒服' (Lying flat is very comfortable) emphasize specific features with a happy tone. (4) Section Title: '吃飯時間' (Meal time) introduces the food segment. (5) Review Text: '雀雀雖小五臟俱全' (Small but complete) appears during the bathroom tour to express satisfaction.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Cabin Feature Demo -> Amenity Showcase -> Dining Review -> Bathroom Tour -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator, 1 male creator, 1 flight attendant, 2 passengers in background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian woman with long brown hair wearing a white jacket over a black top; an Asian man wearing a white sweatshirt and a blue beanie.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A luxury Emirates Business Class cabin with cream-colored upholstery, wood-grain accents, and various electronic panels and screens.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Warm indoor cabin lighting with blue ambient mood lights.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Inventory -> Service Experience -> Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a positive review and walkthrough of the Emirates Business Class experience, emphasizing luxury, space, and high-quality amenities to inspire or inform potential travelers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Displaying branded tickets, amenity kits, and the airline name prominently while reviewing services positively.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy Mandarin vlog style with variety-show captions and beat-synced editing.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses fast pacing and clear visual categorization (seat, food, bathroom) to make luxury travel content digestible for social media audiences.
